title: Parkio Daily for June 23, 2026
teaser: Extended Evening Hours shift from Magic Kingdom to Animal Kingdom in August; Bluey's Wild World opens today; Level99 menu revealed.

rides.name: Flight of Passage
rides.note: Rope drop priority with Bluey crowds expected

breaking.title: Extended Evening Hours moving to Animal Kingdom
breaking.body: Resort hotel guests will find Extended Evening Hours at Animal Kingdom instead of Magic Kingdom on at least two Wednesday nights in August and September. The benefit typically runs Wednesdays and has been exclusive to Magic Kingdom for most of the year.

parkioInsight.text: Animal Kingdom's evening hours typically offer walk-on windows for Flight of Passage and Expedition Everest. Eligible guests may want to save that park for Wednesday evenings in late summer rather than mornings.

bignews.title: Bluey's Wild World opens at Animal Kingdom
bignews.body: Bluey, Bingo, and Australian animal exhibits join Animal Kingdom today as part of Cool Kids' Summer, running through the season and beyond. The experience launched May 26 and continues into fall.

parkioInsight.text: Discovery Island and the character meet zones near the Tree of Life often see heavier foot traffic when new character experiences launch. Rope-dropping Flight of Passage or Kilimanjaro Safaris may help avoid mid-morning congestion.

bignews.title: Level99 food and drink menu released
bignews.body: The two-story bar inside the former DisneyQuest building at Disney Springs now has a full menu available ahead of the interactive experience's opening. Offerings include dishes, desserts, and specialty cocktails.

parkioInsight.text: New dining at Disney Springs typically draws lighter crowds on weekday afternoons before dinner service. Arriving between 2pm and 4pm often means shorter waits for tables and a chance to explore the space before it fills.

bignews.title: Disneyland confirms guest safe after Tiana's Bayou Adventure incident
bignews.body: A child who exited a ride vehicle and slid down the 50-foot drop on Tiana's Bayou Adventure at Disneyland on June 21 is okay, the resort confirmed. The incident occurred Sunday evening and the attraction has since reopened.

parkioInsight.text: Attraction incidents sometimes lead to temporary heightened safety protocols and slower loading. Tiana's Bayou Adventure wait times may run longer than usual today as crews verify operational procedures.

bignews.title: Jollywood Nights details teased for soon
bignews.body: Disney announced that news about the 2026 Jollywood Nights holiday event at Hollywood Studios is coming soon, part of a Halfway to the Holidays social media campaign. No date or ticket information has been released yet.

parkioInsight.text: Holiday event tickets for Hollywood Studios often sell out within days of going on sale. Setting alerts for Disney announcements this week may give you first access to limited-capacity nights.

topstories.title: EPCOT Eat to the Beat concert lineup released
topstories.body: The full performance schedule for live concerts during EPCOT's International Food and Wine Festival is now available. Acts will perform nightly at the America Gardens Theatre throughout the festival.

parkioInsight.text: Concert showtimes typically pull guests toward World Showcase in late afternoon and evening. Riding Test Track or Frozen Ever After during the 5:30pm or 7pm sets often yields shorter waits.

topstories.title: Disney's BoardWalk new venues opening late 2026
topstories.body: Fresh dining, shopping, and nightlife experiences are scheduled to debut at Disney's BoardWalk starting in late 2026. The additions continue the resort area's turn-of-the-century coastal boardwalk theme.

parkioInsight.text: BoardWalk construction and refurbishment projects sometimes bring preview openings or soft openings. Guests staying at nearby EPCOT resorts may find early access opportunities by checking the area in the evenings.

topstories.title: Stoney Clover Lane Fantasyland collection arrives
topstories.body: A new Fantasyland line featuring Cinderella Castle and Mad Tea Party designs from Stoney Clover Lane is now available at Uptown Jewelers in Magic Kingdom. Patches and accessories are part of the release.

parkioInsight.text: Limited-edition collaborations at Uptown Jewelers tend to draw shoppers throughout the day. Visiting within the first hour of park opening or during evening parades often means lighter crowds inside the store.

topstories.title: Lightning Lane Premier Pass selling out near July 4
topstories.body: Magic Kingdom's highest-tier Lightning Lane Premier Pass is sold out on multiple dates surrounding Independence Day weekend. The premium skip-the-line product has reached capacity as the resort enters peak summer travel.

parkioInsight.text: Sold-out Premier Pass dates often signal higher overall attendance and longer standby waits. Guests without Lightning Lane access may find better park experiences at EPCOT or Animal Kingdom during the holiday week.

topstories.title: Toy Story 5 experiences roll out across parks
topstories.body: New character appearances, themed food, and merchandise celebrating Toy Story 5's June 19 theatrical release are now available at Disney parks. The film's opening weekend broke box office records.

parkioInsight.text: Limited-time film tie-in items at Disney parks often sell out within the first few weeks. Checking merchandise locations at Hollywood Studios and Disneyland early in your visit may secure popular pieces before stock runs low.

topstories.title: 32 Disney World restaurants updated menus this week
topstories.body: Menu changes went live across 32 dining locations at Walt Disney World in the past seven days. Updates include new items, seasonal offerings, and pricing adjustments at table-service and quick-service spots.

parkioInsight.text: New menu items at Disney restaurants sometimes take a few days to stabilize in mobile order systems. Checking the My Disney Experience app the morning of your visit often reveals additions that weren't available at reservation time.

icymi.title: Cinderella Castle refresh team profiled
icymi.body: Disney highlighted the crew behind the recent sparkle and paint refresh of Cinderella Castle at Magic Kingdom. The iconic landmark received updated finishes and cleaning to maintain its signature look.

icymi.title: Tiana's Bayou Adventure queue honors military service
icymi.body: New photos from the attraction's queue reveal backstory details about Tiana's father, a decorated World War I veteran. The tributes are visible to guests as they move through the pre-show area.

icymi.title: Disney Lakeshore Lodge construction updates begin
icymi.body: A new blog series called Letters from Lakeshore launched to document progress on Disney Lakeshore Lodge, the nature-inspired resort planned for Bay Lake at Walt Disney World. The first post shares early construction milestones.

spotlight.title: H2O Glow After Hours returns to Typhoon Lagoon
spotlight.body: The neon-lit nighttime water park event is back at Typhoon Lagoon with dancing, unlimited snacks, and wave pool parties. This year's edition features a headlining performer and extended hours for ticket holders.

parkioInsight.text: After-hours events at water parks tend to draw lighter crowds than daytime operations, especially on weeknights. Arriving when gates open for H2O Glow often means walk-on access to slides and minimal wait for food.

videos.summary: This channel showcases updated beignet offerings and the refreshed menu at Boatwright's Dining Hall at Port Orleans Resort.
